about.paragraph1: Originally a developer, I learned to understand algorithms. Today, I turn them into emotional and growth levers.
about.paragraph2: My approach to community management is analytical, human, and impact-driven. I don't just manage accounts, I build communities that turn brands into movements.
about.quote: Here, creativity meets strategy. Every post is thought out, every community is cultivated, every brand becomes a movement.

services.description: Complete solutions to turn your digital presence into a growth machine

service1.subtitle: Brand Audit & Positioning

service5.title: Automation & Performance

service6.title: Web & App Development
service6.subtitle: Modern, fast and optimized websites

service7.subtitle: Master Community Management and explore other key digital skills

features.feature3: Personalized support to boost your career

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.intro: Welcome to Free Digital Solutions' website. This site is operated by our startup in development. We provide below essential information for your transparency.
legal.companyInfo:
Free Digital Solutions
Startup in development, Yaoundé, Cameroon
legal.directorInfo: Yndris Douanla, Founder of Free Digital Solutions
legal.hostInfo: Host: Vercel – Site deployed on the Vercel platform, global cloud for modern applications.
legal.copyrightInfo: All content on this site (texts, images, videos, logos and trademarks) is the property of Free Digital Solutions or its partners. Reproduction is prohibited without permission.
legal.dataInfo: Information collected via this site is used solely within the scope of our services and in compliance with GDPR. You can request access, correction or deletion of your data at any time.
legal.contactInfo: For any questions regarding this site or your data, please contact us at: contact@freedry.dev

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Welcome to Free Digital Solutions' website. Your privacy is important to us. This page explains how we collect, use and protect your personal information.
privacy.collectInfo: We only collect necessary information through contact forms, newsletter subscriptions, or services on our site. This includes your name, email, and any information you choose to provide.
privacy.useInfo: Collected data is used solely to provide our services, respond to your inquiries, and send relevant information. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.cookiesInfo: Our site may use cookies to enhance user experience, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You can manage your cookie preferences directly in your browser.
privacy.shareInfo: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data. Your information is only shared with trusted partners to ensure the proper functioning of our services.
privacy.rightsInfo: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and object to the processing of your personal data. You can exercise these rights by contacting us directly.
privacy.contactInfo: For any questions regarding this policy or your data, please contact us at: contact@freedry.dev

sections.title: Our Integrated Strategic Approach
sections.description: Every step of our approach is designed to create a growth ecosystem around your brand. From strategic positioning to creating captivating content, we connect all actions to maximize your impact.
sections.description2: We provide full support: high-performing campaigns, continuous analysis, optimized conversion, and building a loyal audience that follows and loves you. Every step works in synergy to strengthen your presence and develop an engaged community.

sections.title: Free Yourself from Social Media Stress
sections.description: Do your social media channels require constant time and attention? Let our team of experts handle it for you. We publish, analyze, and adjust your content to create maximum impact with every post.
sections.description2: With us, your audience grows naturally, and your followers become true fans. Every interaction strengthens their attachment to your brand and boosts your visibility.

sections.title: Take Your Brand to the Next Level
sections.description: We analyze your data to discover what really works and what can be improved. Every action is designed to boost your visibility and engagement.
sections.description2: Thanks to our continuous optimization, your brand evolves quickly, stays ahead of competitors, and attracts a loyal, active audience.

sections.title: Turn Your Followers into True Ambassadors
sections.description: We create interactive and engaging campaigns that capture your audience's attention and encourage participation.
sections.description2: Every interaction strengthens follower loyalty and naturally increases your visibility. Result: a strong, active community that talks about you.
